title: Column values are not change while Overwrite existing items using import excel file
excerpt: I am trying to import data from excel into an existing board which in itself is working fine in two days when I do an import, the columns for each item update perfectly but today it is not update the column values as per…

posts.author: HimanshuBarman (Himanshu Barman)
posts.cookedHtml: I am trying to import data from excel into an existing board which in itself is working fine in two days when I do an import, the columns for each item update perfectly but today it is not update the column values as per change in excel .so what is the solution of this problem or It has any limitation while we import? resolve it ASAP
